message:
feat(extensions): add getEditorKeybindings to pi-tui shim (bd-2ej3)

Add getEditorKeybindings export to the @mariozechner/pi-tui shim
to support community extensions that use this API.

This fixes community extensions like prateekmedia-repeat that
import getEditorKeybindings from @mariozechner/pi-tui.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
